messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).

No. The Liezi (列子) is traditionally attributed to Liezi, not to Zhuangzi. Although both Zhuangzi and Liezi are central figures in the Daoist tradition and their texts share certain thematic similarities, they are treated as separate works by separate authors. Zhuangzi is credited with the Zhuangzi (莊子), not the Liezi.
